pageContext.name: Light Fury & Night Lights
pageContext.description: 'Another Night Fury.''No, not quite. It's more like a Bright... Fury.''A Light Fury.''Yeah, yours is better, probably.'  Sideshow and Taka Corp Studio present the Light Fury and Night Lights 1:6 Scale Statue!   This gorgeous sixth-scale statue captures a tender moment between the mother Light Fury watching over her frolicking young, the Night Lights. First appearing in How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World, the Night Lights are the hybrid offspring of the Night Fury, Toothless, and the Light Fury.  Each is numbered with certificate of authenticity in it's packaging including artbox and overboard. Each poly will be held in place with hook and loop straps.
